M-PROXY-ISSUE.NAME: Proxy Provisioning
M-PROXY-ISSUE.Purpose: Translate a verified email into a durable, user-specific MTProto proxy assignment and a cryptographically bound client link.

Scope.Item: Generate a unique SNI subdomain such as `hex.base-domain`
Create a `tg://proxy?...` link from runtime config, private salt, and assignment data
Derive a per-SNI fake-TLS secret from the base secret, private salt, and issued domain
Ensure idempotent issuance for already verified users

Interfaces.Interface: Returns issued proxy metadata for a verified email.

Risks.Risk: SNI collisions or malformed links break client onboarding
Partial failure between policy update and persistence can desynchronize state
Switching to per-SNI credentials invalidates previously issued raw-secret links until they are reissued
